libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For the generated test Gradle setup, add nativeTest runtime system properties for the 5.0.1 run: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. The tests can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on localhost for GET/POST/forms/multipart/cache/session/redirect coverage; no Docker-backed service is normally required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact declares io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 as optional; only tests that intentionally exercise OAuth2WebClient would need an explicit io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2:5.0.1 test dependency, but core WebClient coverage does not require it.
Local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative for whether these Netty runtime flags are sufficient under the selected JDK/native-image mode.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves Vert.x Core 5.0.1 and Netty 4.2.2.Final, matching the existing Vert.x 5.0.0 Netty 4.2.x native-runtime issue; meaningful local WebClient coverage needs no external service or extra dependency, but native runs on JDK 25 need the Netty unsafe/reflection system properties.
